---
title: ""
---


![](images/cloud.png){class="float-left"}
![](images/cloud.png){class="float-right"}


# Hi, I’m Roopa ☁️

<div class="subtitle">
this is my journey through visual analytics 🐾
</div>


![](images/snoopy-main.png){class="hero-float"}

---

## 🔮 Explore

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-4 .card}
![](images/snoopy-study.jpg){class="card-img"}

### 🧪 Hands-on Exercises
Guided practice and learning  

[View →](Hands-on_Ex/)
:::

::: {.g-col-4 .card}
![](images/snoopy-homework.jpg){class="card-img"}

### 🏠 Take-home Exercises
Assignments and deeper work  

[View →](Take-home_Ex/)
:::

::: {.g-col-4 .card}
![](images/snoopy-class.jpg){class="card-img"}

### 🏫 In-class Exercises
Session-based work  

[View →](In-class_Ex/)
:::

:::

---

<div class="footer-note">
built with ☁️ and snoopy!
</div>
